businessPersona.tagline: Precision casting solutions for motors, pumps, and automotive applications
businessPersona.elevatorPitch: Diti Engineers is a Rajkot-based manufacturing firm specializing in CI, aluminum, and pressure die castings for electric motors, submersible pumps, and automobile parts — delivering quality cast components backed by 13+ years of industry experience.

positioning.primary: Trusted casting manufacturer for OEM and industrial buyers
differentiators: Wide product range across CI, aluminum, and pressure die casting
Specialization in motor body, pump parts, and auto component castings
Factory-based manufacturing in Rajkot, Gujarat — India's casting hub
Established GST-registered proprietorship with mid-scale turnover (5–25 Cr)
positioning.valueProposition: Reliable, application-specific castings for motors, pumps, and automotive sectors — from prototype to production volumes.

primary: Industrial equipment makers requiring custom cast components
secondary: Export buyers sourcing castings from India
Trading companies and distributors in Rajkot/Gujarat industrial belt

buyerPersona.title: Procurement / Purchase Manager or OEM Engineering Head
goals: Source quality castings at competitive per-kg or per-unit pricing
Find a supplier with consistent material grades and repeat order capability
Reduce lead time with a local Gujarat-based manufacturer
painPoints: Inconsistent casting quality from small job shops
Limited suppliers who cover both CI and aluminum casting
Difficulty finding specialized motor and pump body castings

avoid: Unverified quality claims without certification data

trustSignals: Company photos and location images available

gst.displayNote: Full GST number available on verified IndiaMART profile

aboutUs.summary: Diti Engineers manufactures a broad range of castings including CI casting, aluminum casting, aluminum pressure die casting, and specialized components for electric motors, submersible pumps, and automobiles.
aboutUs.note: Full About Us copy to be written for landing page — expand from product expertise and manufacturing capability.

mobile.note: Available via IndiaMART contact flow — add when integrating lead capture
